title: Letter addressed to the M.A., about the occurrence of UFOs in Curitiba [1990]
excerpt: “Letter addressed to the Minister of Aeronautics, about the occurrence of unidentified flying objects in the region of Curitiba on October 5, 1990” To the Ministry of Aeronautics Social Communication Center A / C: Mr. Minister Esplanada dos Ministérios Block: M-7th Floor ZIP code 70045 BRASILIA – Distrito Federal Mr. Minister, I would like to […]
text_preview:
“Letter addressed to the Minister of Aeronautics, about the occurrence of unidentified flying objects in the region of Curitiba on October 5, 1990”

To the Ministry of Aeronautics

Social Communication Center

A / C: Mr. Minister

Esplanada dos Ministérios

Block: M-7th Floor

ZIP code 70045

BRASILIA – Distrito Federal

Mr. Minister,

I would like to provide a public service to this establishment, and this service is as follows:

On 10/05/90, at approximately 19:45, I observed a phenomenon in the sky that was the following: There were five spheres in the shape of a light; these spheres moved
summary: Citizen letter to Minister of Aeronautics described five luminous spheres over Curitiba on Oct 5, 1990; four orbited a central stationary sphere then merged and disappeared.
